name: December "Dess" Holiday - That old forest
description:
Exploring the woods with your best friend

First (I think..) request done ever! That's pretty cool

As always, I was listening to...

I rarely ever take requests, cuz I don't really find them interesting, but I liked this one!

also forgot to mention, every one of my dess bots has noelle aged up to 18, cuz im not tryna get nuked
